title: Generic Signs and Components Pack
description: A signs and components pack for FVTM
body:
## This is a Sign Components providing Addon for FVTM!

1.12.2 -> Forge    
1.20.1 -> Forge    
26.1.+ -> Fabric    

By using this Addon you can create custom traffic signs in Minecraft!

## How to use FVTM Signs?
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hrvbpZltANw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### BILIBILI: https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1CgZSYaEzJ/



## Dependencies
FVTM and FCL
